info.name: GanaderaSoft API - Complete v2
info.description:
API Gateway for GanaderaSoft - Comprehensive Livestock Management System

This collection contains all the API endpoints for managing users, authentication, fincas (farms), rebaños (herds), animals, inventories, and more.

## Base URL
`{{base_url}}/api`

## Authentication
This API uses Laravel Sanctum for authentication. Most endpoints require a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

## Environment Variables
- `base_url`: The base URL of your API (e.g., http://localhost:8000)
- `auth_token`: Bearer token obtained from login/register

## User Types
- `admin`: Full access to all resources
- `propietario`: Can manage their own resources
- `tecnico`: Limited access for technical support

## Main Endpoints
- Propietarios (Property Owners)
- Rebaños (Herds)
- Animales (Animals)
- Inventarios de Búfalo (Buffalo Inventories)
- Tipos de Animal (Animal Types)

## Configuration APIs
- Tipo Explotación
- Método Riego
- pH Suelo
- Textura Suelo
- Fuente de Agua
- Sexo
- Tipo Relieve
- Composición Raza
- Etapas

## Reports APIs
- Reportes de Fincas (Farm Statistics)

## New Livestock Management APIs
- Personal Finca (Farm Personnel)
- Peso Corporal (Body Weight)
- Lactancia (Lactation Records)
- Leche (Milk Production)
- Medidas Corporales (Body Measurements)
- Cambios Animal (Animal Changes)

## Enhanced Features
- Animal relationship management (estado_animal, etapa_animal)
- Finca terreno data support
- ComposicionRaza API now returns all records without filtering by fk_tipo_animal_id or fk_id_Finca
- Complete livestock tracking from birth to production

## v2 ? Nuevos m?dulos implementados
- **Terrenos**: gesti?n de caracter?sticas de terreno por finca.
- **Reproducci?n**: registro_celo, servicio_animal, reproduccion_animal, palpacion, semen_toro.
- **Salud animal**: diagnostico, tratamiento, vacunas, casas_comerciales, dosis, historico_aplicacion.
- **Inventario**: inventario_general, inventario_vacuno.
- **Movimientos**: movimiento_rebano (con animales incluidos).
- Auto-clasificaci?n etaria en animales y peso_corporal (campo `clasificacion_etaria`).
- `peso_etapa_etid` opcional en peso_corporal (se resuelve autom?ticamente).
- Validaci?n de sexo en etapas acepta M, F y H.

Obtiene la lista de métodos de riego disponibles

Obtiene la lista de fuentes de agua disponibles
Obtiene la lista de sexos disponibles
Obtiene la lista de tipos de relieve disponibles (Plano, Ondulado, Montañoso, Otro)

request.description:
Get consolidated statistical metrics for all farms of the authenticated propietario.

Returns:
- Total count of farms, herds, animals, and personnel
- Animals breakdown by sex
- Personnel breakdown by worker type
- Detailed statistics per farm (herds count, animals count, personnel count)
- Detailed statistics per herd (animals count)

query.description: Optional filter by specific farm ID

request.description:
Get consolidated statistical metrics filtered by a specific farm.

Query Parameters:
- id_finca: Filter statistics for a specific farm

Returns same structure as the main endpoint but filtered for the specified farm.

query.description: Admin only: Filter by specific propietario ID

request.description:
Admin only: Get consolidated statistical metrics for a specific propietario.

Query Parameters:
- id_propietario: (Admin only) Filter statistics for a specific propietario

Note: Only users with admin role can use this parameter.

Error case: User authenticated but not associated with a propietario profile.

Expected Response (403 Forbidden):
```json
{
    "success": false,
    "message": "Usuario no es propietario"
}
```

item.name: Get Farm Statistics (Error - No Farms Found)

request.description:
Error case: No farms found with the specified filters.

Expected Response (404 Not Found):
```json
{
    "success": false,
    "message": "No se encontraron fincas"
}
```
